title: Pepsi Evolution ( Alien Evo Addon )
description: addon mod made for memes and random aliens that I want to add to Alien Evolution
body:
Pepsi Evolution: The Power of Celestial Soda

This mod was created with the intention of adding pepsiman as an alien in Alien Evolution's omnitrix and right now it works as an addon that allows me to integrate any meme or out of place alien that can come to my mind.



To this date the mod adds the nexts features:

-Pepsiman Alien with a hidden power:

-MonKi, the saiyan transformation of the omnitrix (credits to Ben50BT for the model)

-crafting recipes for items that add this aliens to your omnitrix

Future aliens arent planned and will be open for suggestions.



I also work on another addon named Pinnacle of Evolution that is in the works of being added to curseforge.

Feel free to join the discord!

https://discord.gg/X45csrrYrn
